filename: Transfer of raw and metadata to drive and allas.docx
relative_path: tCycIF projects/Instructions/Transfer of raw and metadata to drive and allas.docx
full_text:
Transfer of raw data

Transfer to hard drive

You will generate 10 different file formats inside one folder for each image :

pysed.ome.tif.bfmemo

ill.cor.ome.tif

metadata

ome.tiff

Pysed.info

Pysed.ome.metadata

rcjob

Rcpnl - our raw data tiles

undistort.json

Palette.json

Check the quality of scanned images from ome.tiff generated by Lola in Avivator

Delete ome.tiff because it is a large file that takes double the space.

Copy the entire folder containing image to external hard drive folder

Folder structure :

FINPROVE_33_2

Cycle1

в”ңв”Җв”Җ 33_S557_pOvaL_2__A1@20260302_135300_187710

в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Pysed.ome.tif.bfmemo

в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Ill.cor.ome.tif

в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Rcjob

в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Rcpnl (our raw data tiles)

в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Undistort.json

в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Palette.json

в”Ӯ

в””в”Җв”Җ 33_p26-2D1_2_2_A1@20260227_084343_650805

в”ңв”Җв”Җ Pysed.ome.tif.bfmemo

в”ңв”Җв”Җ Ill.cor.ome.tif

в”ңв”Җв”Җ Pysed.ome.metadata

в”ңв”Җв”Җ Rcjob

в”ңв”Җв”Җ Rcpnl (our raw data tiles)

в”ңв”Җв”Җ Undistort.json

в””в”Җв”Җ Palette.json

The researchers will then sort it out in a format of folders that is useful for them for preprocessing. Eg: copying the .rcpnl in the folder named вҖҳrawвҖҷ then using that as input for stitching.

Transfer to Allas Started with FINPROVE_exp2_Feb

For each project allas should have a folder structure that Deb will help you prepare.

Copy rcpnl from cycle 1 to a folder named raw. Then copy rcpnl from cycle 2 to the folder named raw, at the end you will have all the rcpnl from all the cycles from same experiment one folder as shown below.

Copy rest of the metadata to folders named cycle1 , cycle2 , cycle3 etc.

Eg: raw files containing 3 cycles from 2 different patient samples, and cycle1, cycle2 cycle3 example folder
